exploration_notes: The query processing flow is: `code.py` calls `scheme.process_user_query(param['q'])` (line 297), which is defined in `schemes/__init__.py` (SearchScheme base class, line 87). This method: (1) strips/escapes slashes and special chars, (2) calls `escape_unknown_fields()` from `query_utils.py` to escape non-field colons, (3) parses via `luqum_parser()` from `query_utils.py`, (4) falls back to `fully_escape_query()` on ParseError, then (5) calls `transform_user_query()` overridden in `works.py` (Wo
